name: Abdullah Al-Otaibi
whatsapp_message:
السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته عبدالله 🌟

لاحظت أنك لم تتواصل معنا بعد، وأنا هنا لمساعدتك في تحضيرك للاختبار القادم خلال 6 أيام 💪

هيا بنا نركز معاً ونرفع درجتك - أنت قادر على ذلك إن شاء الله! 📚
action: Call Abdullah directly today to introduce yourself, assess his main challenges with the material, and schedule a structured 1-on-1 tutoring session before the next quiz in 6 days.
reasoning: Abdullah has never been contacted despite critical risk status and a failing quiz score (18/100). With only 6 days until the next quiz and no facilitator relationship established, immediate personal outreach is essential to prevent further decline and provide targeted academic support.
